design_philosophy: Trustworthy, fast, clear, and easy to use in emergency contexts. Strong visual hierarchy to guide stressed users toward life-saving actions. Clean layouts with bold, legible typography and high-contrast red accents.

buttons.primary: bg-red-600 text-white rounded-xl py-4 px-6 font-semibold flex flex-row items-center justify-center active:bg-red-700 active:scale-95 transition-all
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white rounded-xl py-4 px-6 font-semibold flex flex-row items-center justify-center active:bg-[#1EBE5A] active:scale-95 transition-all shadow-md
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border-2 border-red-100 text-red-600 rounded-xl py-4 px-6 font-semibold flex flex-row items-center justify-center active:bg-red-50 transition-all
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-slate-600 rounded-xl py-4 px-6 font-medium flex flex-row items-center justify-center active:bg-slate-100 transition-all

inputs.default: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-4 text-slate-900 font-medium text-base focus:border-red-500 focus:bg-white placeholder:text-slate-400
inputs.error: bg-white border border-red-500 rounded-xl px-4 py-4 text-slate-900 focus:border-red-600

cards.donor_card: bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 border border-slate-100 shadow-sm flex flex-col gap-3
cards.poster_preview: bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-slate-200 shadow-md
cards.form_section: bg-white rounded-2xl p-5 border border-slate-100 shadow-sm space-y-4

badges.blood_group: bg-red-100 text-red-700 px-3 py-1 rounded-full font-bold text-sm border border-red-200
badges.status: bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 px-3 py-1 rounded-full font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider

layout_patterns.login_screen: Flex-col, centered content, prominent app logo/icon, large input for phone number, highly visible 'Get OTP' button. Clean white background.
layout_patterns.blood_request_form: Scrollable form with sticky bottom CTA. Inputs grouped by category (Patient Info, Hospital Info, Attender Info). Use clear, large labels.
layout_patterns.donor_search: Sticky top filter bar (State, City, Blood Group). Scrollable list of donor cards. Floating Action Button (FAB) or sticky bottom bar for 'Send WhatsApp Request' when donors are selected.
layout_patterns.poster_generation: Auto-rendered View component containing patient details over a medical/red-tinted background image, captured via 'react-native-view-shot' and shared.
layout_patterns.csv_upload: Admin-only screen. Simple dashed dropzone (or file picker button) with clear instructions and a table preview of parsed data.

motion_and_interaction.screen_transitions: Slide from right for deeper navigation, modal slide-up for filters and blood group selection.
motion_and_interaction.button_press: Scale down to 0.95 and slightly dim opacity (Native feedback).
motion_and_interaction.toast_notifications: Slide down from top, auto-dismiss after 3s, red for errors, green for success.
motion_and_interaction.list_loading: Shimmer effect (skeleton loader) on donor cards while fetching data.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure red accents on white backgrounds meet WCAG AA contrast ratios.
accessibility_and_testing.touch_targets: Minimum 48x48 points for all interactive elements.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: Apply 'data-testid' (or 'testID' in React Native) to all interactive elements. e.g., 'login-phone-input', 'submit-request-button', 'donor-card-checkbox'.

icons.usage: Use Feather for clean minimal UI actions, MaterialCommunityIcons for specific blood drops, medical, whatsapp icons.

backgrounds.description: 3D Red Blood Drop - Useful as an inspiration for the app icon or hero graphic on login screen.
ECG graph on a grid background - Perfect subtle medical background for the auto-generated WhatsApp poster.
Artistic depiction of red blood cells - Good for login screen header illustration.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is an Expo React Native application (SDK 54). Do not use React DOM specific components like 'div', 'span', or standard Shadcn UI web components.
Use NativeWind or StyleSheet for styling based on the Tailwind classes provided in these guidelines.

For the 'Auto-generated Blood Request Poster', construct a React Native <View> with a background image (from poster_background url) and text overlaid. Use a library like 'react-native-view-shot' to capture it as an image before sharing via WhatsApp.

Implement the 'Donor List' with checkboxes. A sticky footer should appear when at least 1 donor is selected, showing 'Selected: X (Min 5)'. The 'Send WhatsApp' button should only be enabled when selected >= 5.
Use standard Expo libraries: expo-image for images, expo-sharing/react-native-communications for WhatsApp intent, expo-document-picker for CSV upload.
Ensure all interactive elements have a 'testID' prop matching the data-testid convention (e.g. testID='login-button').
Use Safe-Area boundaries properly to prevent UI overlap with device notches.
